title: RolePilot
description: Built a full-stack AI career platform that helps users track job applications, analyze resumes, compare resumes against job postings, retrieve relevant project evidence, generate grounded tailored resume content, and export polished drafts.
bullet_bank: Built a full-stack AI career platform with 5 REST API workflows and a PostgreSQL backend storing application records, resume drafts, and chunked embeddings for RAG retrieval.
Achieved 80% top-3 retrieval accuracy across 30 job descriptions using a pgvector-based semantic search pipeline over chunked project evidence.
Reduced unsupported LLM-generated claims by 30% across resume tailoring tests by grounding model outputs in retrieved evidence, improving factual consistency.
Enabled stateful multi-turn career guidance across 10+ conversation turns by implementing a Cloudflare Workers-based agent with persistent memory.

title: HeatRisk AI
description: Developed a county heat risk platform that scores 72-hour public health danger from live weather, AQI, and vulnerability inputs and serves real-time risk outputs across U.S. counties.
bullet_bank: Developed a full-stack county heat risk platform using Python, FastAPI, Next.js, and TypeScript to score 72-hour public health danger from live weather, AQI, and vulnerability inputs.
Built a supervised learning pipeline over 29,376 county-day samples and 468 historical heat events, engineering forecast, AQI, SVI, and interaction features for emergency pattern detection.
Improved event detection F1 8.8x over a rule-based baseline, achieving 0.685 F1 and 0.985 ROC AUC with a Random Forest model.
Deployed a FastAPI and Next.js application serving real-time heat risk scores for 3,000+ U.S. counties with severity tiers, driver breakdowns, and county-specific guidance.

title: Divergence 2% Research Lab
description: Worked on TTS model training, dataset creation, comparative model evaluation, and automated scoring workflows for production-oriented speech synthesis research.
bullet_bank: Improved TTS training coherence 10% by building contextual input formatting scripts for Dia model fine-tuning with Hugging Face Trainer.
Increased model coverage by 15% by building a 33-hour voice dataset via web scraping with BeautifulSoup and audio processing with librosa.
Benchmarked GPT-SOVITS vs XTTS across speaker similarity and WER on 100+ test samples to select production TTS models.
Cut manual evaluation time 30% by automating test sample generation and multi-metric scoring across MOS, WER, and speaker similarity.

title: Pac-Man FPGA Project
description: Built a Pac-Man style game in SystemVerilog on FPGA with HDMI output, keyboard input, sprite logic, game state handling, and module debugging in Vivado.
bullet_bank: Built a SystemVerilog-based Pac-Man game on FPGA with HDMI video output and keyboard input integration.
Debugged and integrated game modules including movement, sprites, collisions, and display logic in Vivado.
Strengthened low-level hardware design and validation experience through iterative FPGA development and testing.

title: CS124 Tutor
description: Guided students through object-oriented programming, debugging, and core software engineering reasoning in a large introductory computer science course.
bullet_bank: Guided 50+ students weekly on object-oriented design and debugging across a 600-student introductory CS Java course.
Explained software fundamentals, problem decomposition, and debugging strategies in one-on-one and small-group settings.
